creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 158506
patch

- update from 6.5.5 to 6.5.7
- add py-sqlite3 as a run dependency
- simplify the port

The patch simplifies the port and makes Makefile more readable in cost of removing docs compilation and installation, I think that example configs are enough to make software useable (it was for me), and if user needs API or Changelog - they can looked up in internet.

files/ dir and pkg-plist file are removed.
